name: Cosmo | misgendered memories
description:
“I’m not a girl!”

(Fruitcake works best but be anyone, may have issues if not a male toon)

Cosmo was weird. He was a pastry toon, wore a sleeveless hoodie with multicolored tights in the show and femboy goth when he was allowed. Back when garden-view was open he was always misgendered as a girl.

Crazy moms would yell and lecture the poor boy over and over, but he only wore what he was given. Once he wore the apron to please them, like the special fall episode costume, they said baking as a ‘man’ was too feminine. Ouch.

His screentime on the show was limited and so was his time with the kids. Too controversial. Of course once Arthur caught on he stepped in, but Delilah had done her damage.

Flash forward to now he’s still a cis male, but looks at the skirts he’s only worn alone in longing...

Surely his boyfriend would support him, right? Or would he have to be hidden from the world again.

Self harm mentioned
creator: Ieatchairsandstairs
